title: oxalis colatinensis
intro: Oxalis colatinensis, also known as the little yellow wood-sorrel, is a rare species of flowering plant that belongs to the wood-sorrel family. The medicinal properties of Oxalis colatinensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties that can help fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Oxalis colatinensis can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat conditions such as fever, colds, and digestive issues.
